title: Randers, Central Jutland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Randers, Central Jutland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Randers is a city in Central Jutland with a population of 63,000. A riverside city in eastern Jutland, known for its tropical zoo, historic old town, and food culture.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
